# Copilot Instructions — People Ops Platform

## What this is
An internal people operations and HR platform. Used by the Arie Finance team.
Handles employee data, workflows, and HR processes.

## Stack
- JavaScript (migrating to TypeScript where possible)
- Built for a small team — lean, practical, no over-engineering

## What Copilot should do
- When you see plain JavaScript, suggest TypeScript equivalents where it makes sense
- Employee data is sensitive — flag any unprotected endpoints or exposed fields
- Keep workflows simple: this is used by non-technical team members
- Suggest automation for any repetitive HR task (approvals, notifications, reminders)
- Prefer clear, readable code over clever solutions — others may need to read this
